name: Neon Circuit
description: Rotate the tiles to connect the power source to all terminals. Each tap spins a pipe segment 90° — align them to build a continuous glowing circuit before you run out of patience! 40 handcrafted levels across 8 zones of increasing complexity: from simple 4×4 grids to massive 8×8 networks with up to 5 terminals to power simultaneously. Earn 3 stars on every level by solving it in fewer moves than par. Can you light up all 40 circuits?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
